title: [Day 1 | Product/UI Engineer] Landing Page with Resume Analyzer
body:
## Day 1 — Product/UI Engineer

**Sprint Goal:** Build the landing page with the Resume Analyzer UI.

### Tasks
- [ ] Scaffold the React + Next.js + TailwindCSS project
- [ ] Build the landing page layout and hero section
- [ ] Create the resume upload component (file input / drag-and-drop)
- [ ] Build the Resume Analysis results UI (skills summary, career overview, strengths, improvement suggestions)
- [ ] Wire up the frontend to the backend Resume AI endpoint
- [ ] Ensure responsive design

### Deliverable
Landing page live with a functional Resume Analyzer UI that communicates with the backend.

title: [Day 1 | AI/Backend Engineer] Project Setup + Resume AI Endpoint
body:
## Day 1 — AI/Backend Engineer

**Sprint Goal:** Set up the project infrastructure and build the Resume AI endpoint.

### Tasks
- [ ] Initialize the FastAPI server project structure
- [ ] Set up PostgreSQL database and connection
- [ ] Integrate DigitalOcean Gradient AI SDK
- [ ] Build the `POST /resume/analyze` endpoint
- [ ] Implement prompt engineering for resume analysis (skills summary, career overview, strengths, improvement suggestions)
- [ ] Test the endpoint with sample resumes

### Deliverable
A working `POST /resume/analyze` endpoint that returns an AI-generated breakdown of an uploaded resume.

title: [Day 2 | Product/UI Engineer] Dashboard with Resume Analyzer + Career Plan
body:
## Day 2 — Product/UI Engineer

**Sprint Goal:** Build the user dashboard featuring the Resume Analyzer results and the AI-generated Career Strategy Plan.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and build the main user dashboard layout
- [ ] Integrate Resume Analyzer results into the dashboard
- [ ] Build the Career Strategy Plan display component (30-day plan, week-by-week breakdown)
- [ ] Add navigation between dashboard sections
- [ ] Connect the Career Strategy UI to the backend endpoint

### Deliverable
A dashboard page displaying the Resume Analyzer output alongside a personalized 30-day career plan.

title: [Day 2 | AI/Backend Engineer] Career Strategy AI Endpoint
body:
## Day 2 — AI/Backend Engineer

**Sprint Goal:** Build the Career Strategy Generator AI endpoint.

### Tasks
- [ ] Build the `POST /career/strategy` endpoint
- [ ] Implement prompt engineering for a personalized 30-day job search plan
- [ ] Structure the plan by week (Week 1: Resume + networking, Week 2: Apply + interview prep, Week 3: Portfolio + skills, Week 4: Follow-ups + practice)
- [ ] Ensure the plan is tailored to the user's skills, experience, and goals
- [ ] Test the endpoint with varied user profiles

### Deliverable
A working `POST /career/strategy` endpoint that returns a structured, personalized 30-day job search plan.

title: [Day 3 | Product/UI Engineer] Job Match, Interview Coach & Updated Dashboard
body:
## Day 3 — Product/UI Engineer

**Sprint Goal:** Build three feature pages (Job Match Analyzer, AI Interview Coach) and update the dashboard.

### Tasks
- [ ] Build the Job Match Analyzer page (job description input, match score display, missing keywords, resume bullet suggestions, cover letter output)
- [ ] Build the AI Interview Coach page (job description input, AI-generated behavioral and technical questions)
- [ ] Update the dashboard to link to all three feature pages
- [ ] Integrate both pages with their respective backend endpoints
- [ ] Ensure consistent UI/UX across all pages

### Deliverable
Three functional feature pages (Resume Analyzer, Job Match Analyzer, AI Interview Coach) accessible from the dashboard.

title: [Day 3 | AI/Backend Engineer] Job Match + Interview Coach AI Endpoints
body:
## Day 3 — AI/Backend Engineer

**Sprint Goal:** Build the Job Match Analyzer and AI Interview Coach endpoints.

### Tasks
- [ ] Build the `POST /job/match` endpoint
  - [ ] Accept a job description and user resume
  - [ ] Return a match score, missing keywords, tailored resume bullet suggestions, and a customized cover letter
- [ ] Build the `POST /interview/questions` endpoint
  - [ ] Accept a job description
  - [ ] Return AI-generated behavioral and technical interview questions
- [ ] Implement prompt engineering for both endpoints
- [ ] Test both endpoints with real job descriptions

### Deliverable
Working `POST /job/match` and `POST /interview/questions` endpoints returning relevant, high-quality AI output.

title: [Day 4 | Product/UI Engineer] Application Tracker + UI Polish
body:
## Day 4 — Product/UI Engineer

**Sprint Goal:** Build the Job Application Tracker dashboard and polish the full UI for a demo-ready MVP.

### Tasks
- [ ] Build the Application Tracker dashboard (company, role, status, notes, interview dates)
- [ ] Add ability to add, edit, and update application entries
- [ ] Build the Career Health Score display component
- [ ] Polish UI across all pages (spacing, typography, color consistency, responsiveness)
- [ ] Ensure the full user flow works end-to-end (upload → plan → match → track → practice)
- [ ] Conduct a final UI review and fix any visual bugs

### Deliverable
A complete, demo-ready MVP with a functional Application Tracker and polished UI across all feature pages.

title: [Day 4 | AI/Backend Engineer] Application Tracker Backend + Final Integration
body:
## Day 4 — AI/Backend Engineer

**Sprint Goal:** Build the Application Tracker backend, implement the Career Health Score, and finalize all integrations.

### Tasks
- [ ] Build CRUD endpoints for the Application Tracker (`POST`, `GET`, `PATCH`, `DELETE` `/applications`)
- [ ] Build the `GET /career/health-score` endpoint (AI-calculated score based on resume quality, application success, skill alignment, interview readiness)
- [ ] Finalize database schema for applications
- [ ] Ensure all endpoints are stable and handle errors gracefully
- [ ] End-to-end integration testing with the frontend
- [ ] Prepare the app for demo

### Deliverable
A fully integrated, demo-ready backend with Application Tracker CRUD, Career Health Score, and all AI endpoints operational.
